gateun banghyangeuro dora
seoro nuneul garin chae

ne hyangi beonjin bange nama

Hangeul

같은 방향으로 돌아
서로 눈을 가린 채
똑같은 자릴 걸으며
새파란 말들을 고르고

너와 나 뒤를 돌아보면
달려가 손을 잡는다면
눈을 맞출 수 있을 텐데
우린 같은 방향으로 돌아

걱정돼서 꺼낸 말이었어
네가 힘든 게 싫어 그랬어
나도 서운해 많이 쌓였어
끝까지 이기적으로 굴래?

같은 자리만 round and round
쉽게 꺼내지 못했던 내 마음들
한순간 멀리 떠날 것 같아
너부터 솔직하게 말해봐

말없이 주고받던
의미 없는 눈빛과
식어버린 커피잔에
담아놓은 얘기

자존심을 부리며
서둘러 일어나
멈춰 선 길 위에

같은 자리만 round and round
아직 솔직할 용기가 없는데
긴 한숨 끝에 사랑이 남아
오늘도 같이 돌고 돌고 돌아

멈춘 시간에 round and round
아직도 너를 지워내지 못해
네 향이 번진 방에 남아
오늘도 혼자 돌고 돌고 돌아

isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - Close Enough

Romanization

You walk in and the room feels warm,
like sunlight breaking through a storm.
I try to play it cool tonight,
but you pull me in without a fight.

Every little moment with you
makes the world feel brand new.

You’re close enough to feel,
close enough to breathe.
I don’t know what this is,
but it’s taking over me.
You’re close enough to feel
baby, don’t let go.
If this is something real,
I kinda need to know.
You’re close enough to feel

We talk slow and the night stays still,
your voice moves in, I get a chill.
I didn’t plan to fall this fast,
but here I am, hoping this lasts.

Every time you say my name,
nothing feels the same.

You’re close enough to feel,
close enough to breathe.
I don’t know what this is,

isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - Different

Romanization

You showed up out of the blue,
kinda wild but kinda you.
Didn’t know what I’d been missing,
‘til you laughed and I just listened.
You turned a boring afternoon
into a sky with something new.
I swear the colors shifted bright
the moment you stepped in the light.

My heartbeat’s doing something weird,
guess it’s ‘cause you’re near.

Out of the blue,
you changed my day.
Turned every gray
into something okay.
Out of the blue,
I feel brand new—
funny how life hits different
when it’s you.

We walk around without a plan,
you brush your hair behind your hand.
And suddenly the quiet streets
feel like a movie scene to me.

We talk about the smallest things
your dreams, your fears, your favorite drinks.
And I don’t know how or why,
but you make everything feel right.
There’s something in the way you smile
that makes the moment last a while.
I never thought I’d fall this fast,
but now I hope it kinda lasts.

Every time you say my name,
nothing feels the same.

Out of the blue,
you changed my day.
Turned every gray
into something okay.
Out of the blue,
I feel brand new—
funny how life hits different
when it’s you.
